绝境之中，他绑定天枢系统——一座能完美模拟现实物理的终极虚拟实验室。
从微薄存款起步，他以极致严谨的科学态度，
手搓原子级3D打印机，攻克纳米科技，重构工业基础。
没有花里胡哨，只有硬核科研与步步崛起。
从一间小屋，走向国家实验室；
从地球文明，迈向星海远航。
当人类踏入星际，真正的争霸，才刚刚开始……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/f748fee69bf5920bccf529ee495a4239~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"爱吃蒸馏酒的刘华筝","author_id":"","book_id":"7608982455118203966","book_name":"绑定科研系统我直播震惊世界","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#102840","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7608982477952008766","read_count":"3","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"31578"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"10","tags":"科幻末世","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f748fee69bf5920bccf529ee495a4239~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779319766&x-signature=GQBBIg9mtjUvAB693BLRIKNwVJ4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1390201290365991","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032207292674498FD98833BB73C203"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":1,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"","audio_thumb_uri":"","author":"","author_id":"","book_id":"7608982455118203966","book_name":"","book_type":"","color_dominate":"","creation_status":"","genre":"","genre_type":"","score":"","serial_count":"","tags":"","thumb_url":"","tomato_book_status":""},"filter_tag":[],"hot_word_search":[],"score_cnt":1,"score_text":"1人点评"}},"debug_info":"","log_id":"2026032207292674498FD98833BB73C203","message":"请求成功"}
